title: myrtus communis subsp. lusitanica
intro: Myrtus communis subsp. lusitanica, also known as Portuguese myrtle, is a subspecies of Myrtus communis, a shrub or small tree native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Myrtus communis subsp. lusitanica include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Myrtus communis subsp. lusitanica include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
